---
status: draft
shortDescription: "A class where all fields are private is immutable"
shortCorrection: "A class where all fields are private can still be mutable"
concepts:
  - Mutability
  - Class
  - Field
  - AccessModifier
related:
- id: PrivateMeansFinal 
#  relation: Special case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: PrivateFieldsImplyImmutability
# - pl: Python
#   id: PrivateFieldsImplyImmutability
spec:
# - id: jls13
#   sections: ["11.8"]
plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14
expressibleInNms:
- id: StackHeapGlobalDiagram
  how: object with fields
---
If all instance variables of a class are private, then nobody from outside can change the state of the object, and thus the object is immutable.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A class where all fields are private is immutable
frontmatter.shortCorrection: A class where all fields are private can still be mutable
